_comment: Copy to data/mcp.json's sibling data/llm-provider.json (gitignored). PRIMARY provider is used first — point baseUrl at your local Ollama for a local-first setup. The optional 'fallback' is your OWN external provider (e.g. a hosted API), used only when the primary fails AND the send/task routing isn't 'Local only'. Both API keys stay on this host; the OpenClaw worker never receives them (it calls Latch's /api/llm/chat with the agent key). Set via env instead with LLM_* (primary) and LLM_FALLBACK_* (fallback).
